string-array.name: answer_arr
string-array.item: Xunyou Turbo Yomochieso kwagacha ime ya Game Space/XArena na ebinto birosirie buya ase TECNO/Infinix erinde gwonchoreria omochiso bwa emetandao. Nabo ekonyara gosonsora obokong’u bwa latency ya igoro, kobutorwa, na ebinde, na kobeka enetwork bya na omochieso omuya mono. Egokonya wi-Fi na emetandao ende ya data (5G/4G/3G).
Turbo yomochieso tayari nkokonya ere emechieso emenge. Ekero ebinto binde bia emechieso tibikonyara komenteka, nabo okonyora gokwana na obokoreri bwe chikastoma omotandao bwa abakonyi.

TECNO/Infinix ID na eakaonti ya omochieso ogotumeka obokoreri XArena Turbo Yomochieso obokoreri ase ribaga ria omochieso. Kera eakaonti nabo ekonyara konyora obuya na komenta obokoreri magega ya ogosoa.
1. Orokia boyia erinde korigereria omotandao bwa ogoakana. 2. Rigereria gose ebalansi ya eakaonti ya ogoakana neisaine gokonya gwakana.
Koranche kuna elinki abwo inse osome%1$s na %2$s.

string-array.name: question_arr
string-array.item: Inee turbo yomochieso nabo egokonyan mochieso ki?
Inee eakaonti ki ekageirwe na turbo yomochieso?
Enchera ya yogokora obokong’u bwa ogoakana?
Ase ogosoma Oboasiore Bwamachiko na Okoigwanana Kwomotumeki ?
